Package egovframework.let.uss.umt.service.impl

Class EgovMberManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.uss.umt.service.impl.EgovMberManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovMberManageService
@Service("mberManageService") public class EgovMberManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovMberManageService
일반회원관리에 관한비지니스클래스를 정의한다.
Since:
2009.04.10
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통서비스 개발팀 조재영
See Also:
